SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

THIS SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT (the "SPA") is made on this 15th day of October 2023 by and among the following parties:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 8 Orchard Lane, #12-34, Singapore 238888, and contactable at +65 9123 4567, email: tanweiming@fictionalmail.sg.

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789C), residing at 123 Bedok North Street, #05-67, Singapore 460123, phone: +65 9876 5432, email: sitiaishah@sampledomain.sg.

3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC: S4567890D) representing Muthu Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 201912345A), with registered office at 456 Jurong East Avenue, #10-89, Singapore 600123.

WHEREAS, the Shareholders have agreed to contribute a total of SGD 500,000 towards the company, in accordance with the terms set forth in this SPA.

The Shareholders understand that this agreement does not constitute a project plan and is not an indication of project status.

For further details, please visit https://example.sg/user/S3456789C or contact the relevant shareholder directly.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Shareholders Agreement as of the date first above written.
